name: Fix Resourcebars
command:
let resourceBars = {
          "bar1": {
            "order": 0,
            "id": "bar1",
            "attribute": "status.wounds",
            "max": null,
            "mincolor": "#650707",
            "maxcolor": "#cf0e0e",
            "ownerVisibility": -1,
            "otherVisibility": 30,
            "position": "bottom-inner",
            "invert": false,
            "style": "user",
            "gmVisibility": -1,
            "hideFull": false,
            "hideEmpty": false,
            "hideCombat": false,
            "hideNoCombat": false,
            "indentLeft": null,
            "indentRight": null,
            "shareHeight": false,
            "label": "",
            "subdivisions": null,
            "subdivisionsOwner": false,
            "fgImage": "",
            "bgImage": "",
            "opacity": null,
            "invertDirection": false,
            "hideHud": false
          },
          "bar2": {
            "order": 1,
            "id": "bar2",
            "attribute": "status.astralenergy",
            "max": null,
            "mincolor": "#000080",
            "maxcolor": "#80B3FF",
            "ownerVisibility": 35,
            "otherVisibility": 0,
            "position": "top-inner",
            "invert": false,
            "style": "user",
            "gmVisibility": -1,
            "hideFull": false,
            "hideEmpty": false,
            "hideCombat": false,
            "hideNoCombat": false,
            "indentLeft": null,
            "indentRight": null,
            "shareHeight": false,
            "label": "",
            "subdivisions": null,
            "subdivisionsOwner": false,
            "fgImage": "",
            "bgImage": "",
            "opacity": null,
            "invertDirection": false,
            "hideHud": false
          }
        };

game.canvas.tokens.objects.children.forEach(x => x.document.update({"flags.barbrawl.resourceBars":resourceBars}));

game.collections.get("Actor").forEach(x => x.update({"prototypeToken.flags.barbrawl.resourceBars":resourceBars}))
author: k2irxkER7dd27yKp
